merchantLegal.subtitle: Pick your legal status, upload required documents — activation within 24–48h.

form.publishBlockedTitle: Cannot publish — fix the highlighted fields

descriptionField.label: Description
descriptionField.hint: Unlimited text and photos: write, paste, or drag images between paragraphs. Studio copy generates a structured SEO listing.

variantComposer.title: AI variant studio
variantComposer.description: Describe colors, sizes, SKUs and specs in plain language — the assistant builds your variant matrix and category attributes in one click.
variantComposer.promptPlaceholder: E.g. Create variants: colors Black, Navy, Sand — sizes S, M, L, XL. Material: organic cotton. Brand: EcoWear.

examples.colorsSizes: Create colors Black, White, Red and sizes S, M, L, XL
examples.fullMatrix: Advanced SKU matrix: colors Graphite and Silver, sizes 128GB and 256GB, stock 20 each, supplier price €499
examples.specsOnly: Fill specs only: material stainless steel, origin France, waterproof yes
examples.fashion: Fashion variants: colors Indigo, Ecru, Olive — sizes 38, 40, 42, 44 — cotton linen blend
examples.pcConfigs:
Create 4 PC configs:
12 Go RAM, 256 Go SSD
12 Go RAM, 1 To SSD
12 Go RAM, 512 Go SSD
12 Go RAM, 2 To SSD

booking.title: Slots & reservations
booking.description: Cinema, museum, restaurant — buyers pick a time and receive a QR pass.
booking.descriptionService: Add appointment slots — buyers book a coiffeur session and receive an instant QR pass.
booking.descriptionExperience: Add screening slots with seat capacity — buyers pick a showtime and ticket quantity.
booking.descriptionRestaurant: Add service slots with table covers — buyers pick a time and party size.
booking.descriptionMuseum: Add entry slots with capacity — buyers pick a visit window and ticket quantity.
booking.comingSoonHint: Salon, cinema, restaurant and museum presets are live.
booking.venuePlaceholder: E.g. Salon Éclat · 12 rue de la Paix, Paris
booking.venuePlaceholderRestaurant: E.g. Le Comptoir · 8 rue des Fossés, Lyon
booking.saveDraftForSlots: Save the draft first to manage appointment slots.
booking.slotsHint: One client per slot (capacity 1). Add at least one future slot before publishing.
booking.slotsHintExperience: Set seat capacity per screening. Add at least one future showtime before publishing.
booking.slotsHintRestaurant: Set covers per service slot. Add at least one future reservation window before publishing.
booking.slotsHintMuseum: Set visitor capacity per entry slot. Add at least one future visit window before publishing.
booking.noSlotsYet: No slots yet — add your first appointment.

roster.empty: No bookings in this window — confirmed reservations appear here after payment.

images.selectDropHint: Select or drop multiple images — JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC (min. 320×320 px, auto-optimized).
images.errNoImages: Choose image files (JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC…).
images.errSlotsFull: All slots are full. Remove an image to add more.
images.errSlotsPartial: Only {count} slot(s) left — added the first images.

images.errInvalidUrl: Enter a valid http(s) image link.

supplier.newProductHint: Affiliates set a retail price at or above base price; their margin is split by your commission rate for payouts.

affiliate.marginNote: {rate}% of your margin goes to you when the sale completes.

swipeFeed.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable — try again in a moment.

taxCompliance.title: Curator partner tax framework
taxCompliance.body: You are not the product seller. You receive partner remuneration (supplier commission + net markup) for curation and promotion — declare it under the tax and social rules of your country of residence.
taxCompliance.nonSeller: Professional seller obligations (retail VAT, legal warranties, withdrawal rights against the seller) rest with the supplier, not your curator storefront.
taxCompliance.buyerVat: VAT on customer purchases is calculated at checkout based on the buyer's delivery or consumption country and is exclusively the selling supplier's obligation.
taxCompliance.records: Keep your Affisell statements and payment notifications as an accounting baseline for your filings.
taxCompliance.dac7: Affisell may report your platform earnings to competent authorities (DAC7 / digital platform reporting) as required by law.
taxCompliance.advice: Affisell does not provide tax advice. Consult an accountant or tax adviser in your country if needed.

variantAnalytics.title: Margin analytics by variant
variantAnalytics.subtitle: Last {days} days · net partner earnings per SKU sold on your storefront.
variantAnalytics.periodUnits: {count, plural, one {# unit sold} other {# units sold}}
variantAnalytics.empty: No variant sales in this window yet — publish multi-SKU listings from Discover.
variantAnalytics.footnote: Conversion is at listing level (sales ÷ PDP clicks). Mix = share of units for this variant on the listing.

marginBulkFix.title: Margin reviews pending
marginBulkFix.body: {count, plural, one {# listing needs a margin update after a supplier price increase.} other {# listings need margin updates after supplier price increases.}}

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Orders, returns, payment and account — plain answers, no jargon.
faq.sellerA: The product is sold by a verified professional partner. Affisell secures payment and customer support. We do not disclose the seller's name — your legal rights and warranties are unchanged.
faq.trackA: Sign in with the email used at checkout, then open My orders. You'll see status, tracking and return options. We email you at each key step.
faq.confirmQ: I didn't receive a confirmation email
faq.confirmA: Check spam and the email entered at checkout. If payment went through, the order appears in My orders within a few minutes. Otherwise contact us with the date and amount charged.
faq.cancelA: Before shipment, ask support to cancel. If there's no tracking long after the stated deadline, a refund may be triggered automatically. After shipment, only a return after delivery is possible.
faq.delayA: In France and the EU: usually 3–7 business days after dispatch. The estimate is shown on the product page before you pay.
faq.lateA: Check carrier tracking in My orders first. If tracking never appears long after the promised date, contact support — we may cancel and refund depending on the case.
faq.returnQ: How do I return a product?
faq.returnA: You have <l22118>14 calendar days after delivery</l22118> (<dir201183>EU Directive 2011/83</dir201183>). Open a request from My orders or see our <protectedCheckout>Protected checkout</protectedCheckout> page. The item should be in good condition, preferably in original packaging.
faq.returnRefusedQ: Why can't I return some products?
faq.returnRefusedA: Law excludes certain products from the 14-day withdrawal right: custom-made items, sealed hygiene products once opened, perishables, etc. (see <l22128>French Consumer Code article L221-28</l22128>). This isn't someone "refusing" your return — those categories simply aren't eligible for no-reason returns.
faq.refundA: After your return is accepted: allow 5–10 business days on your payment method, depending on your bank. The legal maximum is 14 days (<l22124>art. L221-24</l22124> French Consumer Code). If cancelled before shipment, refund is usually initiated within 48 hours.
faq.defectA: Contact us within 48 hours with photos and your order number. We'll arrange exchange or refund under the legal conformity warranty (<l2174>art. L217-4</l2174>; <dir201183>EU Directive 2011/83</dir201183>).
faq.methodsQ: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.methodsA: Secure card payment (3D Secure) via Stripe. Affisell never stores your card details.
faq.failedA: Try another card or contact your bank. Make sure the billing address matches the card. You are not charged if payment fails.
faq.cashbackA: On some products, part of the price may be credited to your Affisell wallet after purchase. Sign in before checkout — balance applies on your next eligible order.
faq.loginQ: How do I access my account?
faq.loginA: Use the same email as at checkout on the customer sign-in page. You'll find orders, returns and your wallet there.
faq.stillNeedHelpBody: The support assistant answers 24/7. For complex disputes, our team replies within 2 business days.

shipping.title: Delivery & tracking
shipping.description: Shipped by our supplier partners — automatic tracking notifications at every step.
shipping.delayEu: France & EU: 3–7 business days after shipment (product and warehouse dependent).
shipping.delayIntl: International: 7–14 business days — customs fees may apply to the buyer.
shipping.delayProduct: Exact estimate is shown on the product page before checkout.
shipping.legalNote: Under <dir201183>EU Directive 2011/83 (art. 6)</dir201183>, delivery times and shipping costs are shown before you pay.
shipping.tracking1: Confirmation email once Stripe payment succeeds.
shipping.tracking2: Shipping email with carrier tracking number.
shipping.tracking3: Delivery email + review reminder on day 7.
shipping.issueBody: If the stated deadline passes with no tracking, our system may auto-cancel and refund. Otherwise use the support assistant or FAQ.
shipping.carriersSubtitle: Popular, reliable services by ship-from and delivery country — Affisell reference list.
shipping.empty: No carrier listed for this route. The supplier may use an equivalent tracked local service.

trackOrder.metaDescription: Affisell order tracking — status and carrier updates in your customer account.
trackOrder.title: Track my order
trackOrder.description: Sign in with your Affisell customer account (same email as checkout) to see status, tracking, and manage a return.
trackOrder.stepLogin: Sign in or create a customer account with the email used at checkout.
trackOrder.stepOrders: Open “My orders” for details and carrier tracking.
trackOrder.stepEmail: A confirmation email is sent at each key step.

accessibility.metaDescription: Affisell accessibility commitment — keyboard navigation, contrast, user feedback.
accessibility.title: Affisell for everyone
accessibility.description: We continuously improve the experience for people with disabilities — on mobile and desktop web.

perceivable.title: Perceivable
perceivable.body: Stronger contrast, resizable text, visual alternatives on key elements.

operable.title: Operable
operable.body: Keyboard navigation, adequate touch targets, no focus traps on checkout flows.

understandable.title: Understandable
understandable.body: Clear labels, actionable error messages, linear checkout paths.

robust.title: Robust
robust.body: Components tested on modern browsers and common screen readers.

accessibility.statusBody: Affisell targets WCAG 2.1 Level AA on public buyer journeys. Some pro dashboard pages are still being aligned.
accessibility.feedbackBody: Hit an accessibility blocker? Email {email} with the page and device — we prioritize fixes.

protectedCheckout.metaDescription: Secure payment, 14-day EU returns and legal warranties — what every buyer needs to know in 30 seconds.
protectedCheckout.title: Shop with confidence
protectedCheckout.description: Secure payment, European right of withdrawal (<dir201183>EU Directive 2011/83</dir201183>) and legal warranties — zero jargon.
protectedCheckout.paymentBody: Secure payment powered by Stripe. Your card details never pass through Affisell.
protectedCheckout.paymentHint: Strong Customer Authentication (3D Secure) may be required by your bank under the <psd2>EU Directive 2015/2366 (PSD2)</psd2>.
protectedCheckout.returnsIntro: Changed your mind or received a faulty item? Here is who pays for what and when you get refunded, under the <l22118>French Consumer Code</l22118> and <dir201183>EU Directive 2011/83</dir201183>.

changeMind.refundDelay: 14 days after we receive the return

defective.refundDelay: 14 days after we receive the return

protectedCheckout.returnsHowTitle: How do I request a return?
protectedCheckout.returnsHowBody: From your order account or via our support team — state the reason and follow the return shipping instructions.
protectedCheckout.returnsExceptions: Some products are excluded from the right of withdrawal (<l22128>art. L221-28</l22128>; <dir201183>Directive 2011/83/EU, art. 16</dir201183>): custom-made, sealed hygiene goods, perishables…
protectedCheckout.warrantyBody: Your purchases are covered by the legal conformity warranty — 2 years (<l2174>art. L217-4</l2174>; <dir201183>EU Directive 2011/83</dir201183>) — and the hidden-defect warranty (French Civil Code). An issue? Contact us.
protectedCheckout.mediationBody: If a dispute is not resolved with our support, you can contact a consumer mediator free of charge (<l6121>art. L612-1</l6121> et seq.) or the <odr>EU ODR platform (Reg. 524/2013)</odr>:

mentions.metaDescription: Publisher, registered office, host, DPO and mediation — LCEN information.
mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.description: Structured document under the <lcen>LCEN Act 2004-575, art. 6 III</lcen>.

editor.title: 1. Site publisher
editor.domiciliationNote: Commercial domiciliation address filed with the trade register — not the director's home address.

publisher.title: 2. Publication director
publisher.noPhone: Affisell does not offer phone support — please contact us by email.

mediation.title: 5. Mediation & disputes
mediation.body: Under <l6121>French Consumer Code articles L612-1 et seq.</l6121> and <odr>EU Regulation 524/2013</odr>, consumers may use a free mediator. EU consumers may also use the online dispute resolution platform.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual property
ip.body: The entire Affisell site (structure, text, graphics, logo, databases) is protected under the <cpi>French Intellectual Property Code</cpi>. Unauthorized reproduction constitutes infringement.

about.metaDescription: Affisell connects verified suppliers, partner storefronts and buyers with a protected shopping experience across the EU.
about.title: Commerce infrastructure for creators
about.description: Affisell is a creator-first marketplace: suppliers list their catalog, partners launch a storefront in minutes, and buyers shop with confidence.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Creators should monetize their audience without inventory or logistics. Affisell orchestrates the full loop — catalog, secure checkout, supplier fulfillment and GDPR-compliant trust signals.
mission.body2: Headquartered in Marseille, we ship EU-first with multi-currency checkout and tools built for product discovery and storefront growth.

0.title: Creator storefronts
0.body: Each partner gets a branded shop, custom listings and intuitive merchandising — live in minutes.

1.title: Supplier reach
1.body: Brands publish once and reach engaged audiences through thousands of partner storefronts.

2.title: Clarity for everyone
2.body: Buyers, partners and suppliers see readable information on every order — no surprises.

3.title: Trust by design
3.body: Legal hub, GDPR export and deletion, cookie consent and invoices built into the product.

2024.title: Affisell founded
2024.body: Marketplace launch: supplier catalog and creator partner storefronts.

2026.title: Trust & compliance
2026.body: Legal document hub, GDPR dashboards and integrated invoicing.

2025a.title: Discovery & sourcing
2025a.body: Product discovery and selection tools for creator partners.

2025b.title: Buyer experience
2025b.body: Order tracking, simplified returns and clearer sale summaries.

sections.intro: Product discovery shouldn't feel like an endless spreadsheet. Affisell offers a smooth mobile path to explore, filter and publish.

s1.title: How it works
s1.body: Browse the catalog, pick products that fit your audience and publish to your storefront — without revisiting items you've already passed on.

s2.title: Built for speed
s2.body: A responsive interface and intuitive gestures keep selection pleasant even on mobile or slower networks.

s3.title: Try it

commission-transparency.title: Clarity on every order
commission-transparency.excerpt: Suppliers, partners and buyers get readable information on every sale.

sections.intro: Opaque marketplaces breed mistrust. Affisell shows clear summaries on order pages, receipts and invoices.

s1.title: For every party
s1.body: Each actor sees what matters to them in plain language — without unnecessary accounting jargon.

s2.title: Supplier clarity
s2.body: Supplier dashboards spell out amounts and deductions explicitly — no vague “adjustments”.

s3.title: Built-in guidance
s3.body: Contextual explanations on order detail link to the applicable legal terms.

sections.intro: Trust is a product feature. Affisell embeds consent, cookies and data rights directly in the account experience.

s2.title: Self-service rights

s3.title: Why it matters
s3.body: Creators operate across the EU. Built-in compliance reassures brand partners and buyers alike.

press.description: Facts, boilerplate and assets for journalists covering creator commerce and EU retail tech.

boilerplate.title: Boilerplate
boilerplate.short: Affisell is a creator-first marketplace connecting verified suppliers, partner storefronts and buyers — with built-in EU compliance.
boilerplate.long: Founded in Marseille, Affisell lets creators launch branded shops in minutes without inventory. Suppliers distribute through a partner network with automated fulfillment. The platform includes discovery tools, GDPR self-service and transparent order tracking.

compliance.label: Compliance
compliance.value: GDPR hub, versioned legal docs, invoice PDFs

demoAccounts.disabled: Demo Lab is off (production without DEMO_LAB_ENABLED=1, or DEMO_LAB_ENABLED=0).
demoAccounts.notConfigured: Add DEMO_LAB_PASSWORD in Vercel → Environment Variables → Preview (and Production if needed), then redeploy. Vercel Preview enables Demo Lab automatically.
demoAccounts.rateLimited: Too many attempts — try again in a few minutes.

accountOrders.emptyHint: Explore personalized picks on the home catalog or swipe products in Pulse.
accountOrders.emptyPostCheckoutHint: Your order is being confirmed. While you wait, discover more picks tailored to you.

preparing.title: Your supplier is preparing shipment
preparing.body: The selling supplier is packing your order. Tracking appears once the carrier scans the parcel.

confirmDelivery.body: Received and satisfied? Confirm delivery to close your order. Your statutory withdrawal right remains during the return window.

trackingForm.hint: Ship the item to the address from your order confirmation, then add tracking here.

fulfillmentPanel.title: Shipping update
fulfillmentPanel.extensionAsk: The supplier requests {days} extra days to ship:

meta.title: Partner program — status & tax
meta.description: B2B page: independence, net commissions, payouts, prohibited conduct and DAC7.

sellAffiliateProgram.title: Affisell curator partner

hero.subtitle: Earnings on catalogue net price — no salary. {days}-day attribution cookie. Typical {min}–{max}% per listing.

status.title: Legal status
status.warning: You are self-employed. No fixed salary. Declare your earnings. Affisell is not your employer.
status.legalRef: Anti-disguised employment framework — French Labour Code art. L8221-6. No subordination, fixed hours or guaranteed pay.

catalog.title: Catalogue by vertical
catalog.body: Browse listings by category — supplier identities are never exposed (trade secrecy & GDPR).
catalog.noSuppliers: Warehouse and supplier brand names are never shown to curator partners.

tax.title: Tax by country of residence
tax.body: Declare partner earnings (commission + net markup) in your country. Affisell does not withhold unless legally required.
tax.dac7Dashboard: Annual CSV export available in your earnings cockpit (DAC7).

payout.title: Payouts
payout.body: Minimum threshold {min}. Payout J+{days} after calendar month-end (Stripe Connect batch).
payout.clawback: If the buyer returns the order, commission is cancelled — even if already paid: clawback on your next earnings.

prohibited.title: Prohibited practices
prohibited.body: Any breach triggers a compliance review.

items.spam: Spam, unsolicited messages or purchased lists
items.brandMisuse: Unauthorized use of third-party brands or supplier logos
items.fakeReviews: Fake reviews, astroturfing or misleading incentives
items.googleAdsOnAffisellName: Google Ads / SEA on the name “Affisell” or Affisell trademarks

prohibited.sanction: Sanction: program ban + forfeiture of earnings from the last {days} days pending settlement.

sellAffiliateProgram.footerLegal: B2B information only — partner terms (CGS) and your local legal status prevail. No income promises.

meta.title: Become a supplier — tax & payouts
meta.description: B2B page: OSS VAT, Stripe Connect payouts, return clawback and DAC7. Professionals only.

sellBecomeSupplier.title: Supplier tax & payout framework
sellBecomeSupplier.description: Accountant-ready summary: OSS VAT, payout flow, returns and DAC7 reporting. No income promises — contractual mechanics only.
sellBecomeSupplier.b2bNotice: For business users only (B2B). Not tax or legal advice. Consult your accountant for filing decisions.

tax.title: Tax & OSS scheme
tax.body: You invoice catalogue sales ex-VAT (net wholesale). Affisell collects VAT at the buyer's delivery-country rate via the EU OSS scheme and remits to the relevant authorities.
tax.ossExampleBody: If the buyer is delivered in Germany, Affisell applies the German rate (19%) on the line net amount at checkout. You issue your supplier invoice ex-VAT; VAT collected for the consumption country is not part of your wholesale payout.
tax.bulletVat: Delivery-country VAT = collected by Affisell (Stripe Tax + OSS reporting).
tax.bulletInvoice: Buyer VAT invoice: issued through Affisell under the facilitated sale.
tax.tableCaption: Standard VAT rates by EU delivery country
tax.tableFootnote: Standard B2C rates as of {date} — {count} member states. Reduced/special rates not listed; verify before filing.

payout.title: Payouts (Stripe Connect)
payout.body: Supplier transfer to Stripe Connect after delivery confirmation + {days} business days (auto-confirmation if the buyer stays silent). Contract catalogue fee: {fee} of ex-VAT wholesale.
payout.stepAffisellHint: Illustrative example — contractual {fee} on net wholesale
payout.stepStripeHint: EU card ~1.5% + fixed (varies by payment method)
payout.stepYouHint: Net ex-VAT wholesale · within J+{days} after confirmed delivery
payout.disclaimer: Rounded illustrative example (€100 gross). Actual amounts depend on catalogue net price, creator partner commission and payment fees. Collected VAT is not paid out to your Connect account.

clawback.title: Returns & clawback
clawback.body: Buyers have a {days}-day withdrawal right from delivery (EU distance selling). If a return is accepted and refunded, amounts already paid or provisioned are recovered.
clawback.debit: On an approved statutory return: debit of your Stripe Connect balance for ex-VAT wholesale + refunded VAT share per order settlement.
clawback.provision: If your rolling return rate exceeds {threshold}% over 90 days, a {reserve}% reserve may be held on upcoming payouts until the rate normalises.

dac7.title: DAC7 & reporting
dac7.body: If you exceed €{eur} platform revenue per year or {tx} sales per year, Affisell reports your platform earnings to the French tax authority (DGFiP) under DAC7.
dac7.csv: A CSV summary (identity, platform revenue, countries) is available in your dashboard before each filing.

sellBecomeSupplier.footerLegal: Affisell is a technical intermediary and host. You remain the seller and are responsible for your accounting, social and tax obligations. Figures may change; supplier terms (CGA) prevail.

buyerOrderDetail.verifiedPartner: Sold by a verified Affisell partner
buyerOrderDetail.etaPending: Updating — we'll email you when ready
buyerOrderDetail.withdrawalBody: You may return this item without giving a reason during the legal period.
buyerOrderDetail.refundInitiated: Refund initiated. Allow 5–10 business days depending on your bank.
buyerOrderDetail.returnApproved: Request approved — ship the item to the address below.

contactAcknowledgment.cardTitle: While you wait, these links solve 80% of questions:
contactAcknowledgment.footer: Need to add details? Reply to this email or write to {supportEmail} and quote #{ticketRef}.

abandonedCheckout.heading: Your cart is waiting
abandonedCheckout.body: You started a purchase on Affisell. Your selection is still available — secure Stripe checkout and tracked delivery.
abandonedCheckout.footer: Questions? Check the FAQ or the support assistant on Affisell.
